name: Navigation with deep linking
description: Validate that the skill correctly guides implementation of Expo Router navigation with deep linking, typed route parameters, and universal link handling.
prompt: Set up Expo Router navigation for a React Native app with the following screens: Home (tabs), Product Detail (stack with id param), and Settings (drawer). Configure deep linking so that `myapp://product/123` opens the Product Detail screen. Include TypeScript types for all route params and handle the case where a deep link arrives while the app is in a killed state.

assertions.description: Must use file-based routing in the app/ directory following Expo Router conventions
Must configure a deep linking scheme (e.g., in app.json or app.config.ts) for universal/deep link handling
Must implement typed dynamic route parameters for the product detail screen
Must implement tab-based navigation using Expo Router layout files
Must handle incoming deep links including cold-start scenarios using Expo Linking or equivalent

name: Native module bridging with Expo Modules
description: Validate that the skill correctly guides creation of a custom native module using the Expo Modules API with Swift/Kotlin implementations and TypeScript bindings.
prompt: Create an Expo Module called `ExpoHaptics` that exposes a `triggerImpact(style: 'light' | 'medium' | 'heavy')` method. Implement the Swift code for iOS using UIImpactFeedbackGenerator and the Kotlin code for Android using VibrationEffect. Include the TypeScript type definitions and show how to consume the module from a React Native component. Ensure the module uses TurboModule codegen specs.

assertions.description: Must use the Expo Modules API (expo-modules-core) for defining the native module
Must include iOS Swift implementation using UIImpactFeedbackGenerator for haptic feedback
Must include Android Kotlin implementation using VibrationEffect or Vibrator for haptic feedback
Must define module functions using Expo Modules function registration API
Must provide TypeScript exports and show consumption from a React Native component
